---
title: "Sacred Economics"
description: "Robin Lovelace (2013). Sacred Economics. *Now Then*."
date: "2013-02-01"
title-block-banner: false
toc: false
citation-key: "lovelace_sacred_2013"
citation-type: "article-journal"
citation-type-label: "Journal Article"
venue: "Now Then"
doi: ""
publication-url: "http://nowthenmagazine.com/issue-59/sacred-economics/"
authors:
  - "Robin Lovelace"
abstract: "This text provides a review or discussion of alternative economic systems and the transition to a more sustainable society. It explores concepts related to the role of economics in ecological and social well-being."
---

**Type:** Journal Article
**Venue:** Now Then
**Year:** 2013

[URL](http://nowthenmagazine.com/issue-59/sacred-economics/) [BibTeX](entry.bib)

## Abstract

This text provides a review or discussion of alternative economic systems and the transition to a more sustainable society. It explores concepts related to the role of economics in ecological and social well-being.

## Citation

Robin Lovelace (2013). Sacred Economics. *Now Then*.

## BibTeX

```bibtex
@article{lovelace_sacred_2013,
	title = {Sacred {Economics}},
	copyright = {CC0 1.0 Universal Public Domain Dedication},
	url = {http://nowthenmagazine.com/issue-59/sacred-economics/},
	abstract = {This text provides a review or discussion of alternative economic systems and the transition to a more sustainable society. It explores concepts related to the role of economics in ecological and social well-being.},
	journal = {Now Then},
	author = {Lovelace, Robin},
	month = feb,
	year = {2013},
	keywords = {Book review, degrowth},
}
```

## Notes

{{< include _notes.qmd >}}
